---
name: Report stale entry
about: Report an indexed driver that may be broken, stale, archived, mislabeled, or no longer ROS 2 relevant
title: "Review: "
labels: review-needed
---

## Entry

Repository URL from the list:

https://github.com/

## Problem

What changed upstream?

- [ ] Repository is archived, disabled, or unreachable
- [ ] ROS 2 support is unclear or removed
- [ ] License evidence changed or is missing
- [ ] Hardware target or supported models changed
- [ ] Branch, distro, firmware, SDK, or controller requirements changed
- [ ] Other metadata is stale

## Evidence

Upstream links, release notes, files, or documentation that show the issue:

## Suggested action

- [ ] Update metadata
- [ ] Move to `needs-review`
- [ ] Move to `legacy`
- [ ] Remove from the main list
